roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT
PRVT ATTNY MOT TO STRIK PRIOR CONVIC FILED TODAY

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO   COUNTY TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO  COUNTY TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/
/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION RE COMPLETION OF PROGRAM/DEF:COMPLETEDASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN TRAINING PROGRAM/CTORD:1 YEAR CJ STAY BE PERM STAYED/

/CAL:SENTENCE & MOTION TO STRIKE PRIOR CONVICTION/MO GRTD/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:21/24MREVIEW/CTORD:ONE-YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ASIAN NEIGHBORHOOD DESIGN TRAINING PROGRAM//DNACOMP/IND/DEF:SHALL PARTICIPATE IN THE TAY UNIT AS DIRECTED BY APD/WS/DEF:SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $170,000, PLUS 15% ADMINISTRATIVEFEE/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANTIS SENTENCED TO 10 DAYS COUNTY JAIL WITH 10 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/VF2:150/CTORD:GUILTY PLEA WITHDRAWN AS TO COUNT 3 AND COUNT 3 IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PC 1385/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1, 2, AND 3/X:DEFENDANT ADMITS ALLEGATION RE PRIOR/FNDG/X:PLEA OPEN/TWS/VD:01-04-16 PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:MOTION TO STRIKE STRIKE/DOP/
/CON: RICHARD SHIKMAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 01-07-16/987,2/BAIL:150000/CONTD: STATUS CONFERENCE RE PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: THREE HOURS/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/LD:01-07-16/TE:3 HOURS/CONTD:FURTHER PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 12-31-15 AND PRELIMINARY  HEARING ON 01-04-16/DOP/
